title: Items & Weapons x Punchy! Compatibility
description: This is a resource pack for some weapons, swords, and items from some mods specified in the description.
body:
This contains compatibility updates for different mods, slightly tweaking the items so they work well, as well as adding compatibility for the correct use of items so they coordinate with their animation. Mods Affects:
Mekanism
Mekanism Weaponry 
Kimetsunoyaiba (All Weapons) 
Ars nouveau 
Evilcraft

Este contiene compatibilidades con diferentes mod arreglando un poco los items para que se van bien, Ademas de agregar compatibilidades con el uso correcot de los items para que coordinen con su animacion; Afecta a los Mods:
Mekanism
Mekanism Weaponry 
Kimetsunoyaiba (All Weapons) 
Ars nouveau 
Evilcraft


I recommend installing this textutra pack along with it for greater compatibility with other mods.
Recomiendo instalar junto a este pack de texutra para mas compatibilidades con otros mods.
Link: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/punchy!-compatibility
